india_trends.title: Wockhardt shares surge over 12% to 9-month high as company swings to profit in Q4
india_trends.summary: Wockhardt's shares surged 12.55% to ₹1,604 following a profitable Q4FY26 with a net profit of ₹164 crore. Strong revenue growth from biotech and emerging markets fueled performance, with full-year revenue rising to ₹3,373 crore and EBITDA increasing by 51%.

india_trends.title: India flexible workspace market to expand up to 18% on GCC, startup demand: Crisil
india_trends.summary: India's flexible workspace sector is poised for significant growth. Capacity is set to rise by 16-18% over the next two fiscal years, reaching 140-145 million sq ft. india_trends.title: India among most resilient emerging markets to global shocks: Moody’s Ratings
india_trends.summary: Amid global uncertainties, India emerges as a beacon of resilience, ready to tackle potential economic upheavals. india_trends.title: Why DIIs hiked stake in 82% of Nifty stocks in last one year? Here's what Motilal Oswal says
india_trends.summary: Motilal Oswal highlights a structural shift in India’s markets, with domestic institutional investors (DIIs) increasing their dominance as foreign investors reduce exposure. DII ownership in the Nifty 50 has hit a record high, while FII holdings have fallen to multi-year lows.

india_trends.title: Hyderabad emerges as the biggest market of South India’s ultra-luxury residential market
india_trends.summary: Hyderabad has become South India's top ultra-luxury housing market. Transactions for homes over Rs 10 crore reached Rs 8,562 crore in FY'26. india_trends.title: Raymond Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 91% YoY to Rs 12 crore despite 8% revenue uptick
india_trends.summary: Raymond on Tuesday reported a steep 91% YoY drop in Q4 net profit to Rs 12 crore despite an 8% revenue rise. Sequentially, PAT improved 68%. EBITDA and margins weakened, but FY26 reflected steady growth driven by aerospace, defence, precision technology, and auto components, with management emphasis

india_trends.summary: Marico Q4 results: Net profit rises 14% YoY to ₹391 crore, ₹4 per share dividend announced. The stock opened at ₹789.05 apiece today, as compared to previous close of ₹784.55 on Monday.

india_trends.title: USD vs INR: Indian Rupee may depreciate to 96 per US dollar amid rising crude oil prices, global risk
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee fell 20 paise to 95.43 against the US dollar amid geopolitical tensions and rising Brent crude prices, impacting oil-importing nations. Experts warn that prolonged currency weakness could worsen India's current account deficit and trigger further capital outflows.

india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are impacting India's economy, leading UBS Securities to lower its GDP growth forecast to 6.2% and revise inflation estimates upward.
